payload.body: Docs reframe shipped. README leads with a three-mode capability table (single-file / cargo+wrapper / cargo-no-wrapper) making the split first-class. SPEC.md Activation section gets the same table at the top, with the per-mode docs reorganised under it. Decided not to rename strict!{} → lints!{} for now — the same marker activates either subset depending on whether the wrapper is set; renaming would imply lint-only when it's actually the toolchain that decides.
